raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XXXX was contracted in XX/XX/year> to remodel my bathroom ; however, contractor did not obtain necessary permits as required by XXXX  XXXX. I initiated a dispute with XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX disputed the transactions with Citi XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year> for XXXX separate charges for {$2800.00}, {$2600.00} and {$2800.00} and repeatedly provided documentation over the last XXXX  months. As of today 's date ( XXXX  months later ), Citi has advised me that I'm now responsible for the charges, although the merchant hasn't performed the remodel based on Maryland home improvement law requirements.
